mimo_config.message0: Configure Xiaomi MiMo API Key %1 Base URL %2
mimo_config.tooltip: Configure Xiaomi MiMo AI API key and base URL

mimo_chat.message0: Xiaomi AI Chat user message %1 model %2
mimo_chat.tooltip: Send message to Xiaomi MiMo AI and get response

mimo_chat_with_history.message0: Xiaomi AI Multi-turn Chat user message %1 model %2
mimo_chat_with_history.tooltip: Xiaomi MiMo AI with multi-turn conversation support

mimo_set_system_prompt.tooltip: Set the AI assistant's role and behavior rules

mimo_image_understand_url.message0: Xiaomi AI Image Understanding (URL) image URL %1 prompt %2

mimo_image_understand_base64.message0: Xiaomi AI Image Understanding (Base64) Base64 image %1 prompt %2
mimo_image_understand_base64.tooltip: Analyze images using Base64 encoded data

mimo_image_understand_capture.tooltip: Capture from camera and upload to Xiaomi AI for image understanding

mimo_audio_understand.message0: Xiaomi AI Audio Understanding audio URL %1 prompt %2

mimo_audio_understand_base64.message0: Xiaomi AI Audio Understanding (Base64) Base64 audio %1 prompt %2
mimo_audio_understand_base64.tooltip: Analyze audio using Base64 encoded data

mimo_video_understand.message0: Xiaomi AI Video Understanding video URL %1 prompt %2 fps %3
mimo_video_understand.tooltip: Analyze video using URL, with configurable frame rate

mimo_tts.message0: Xiaomi AI TTS text %1 voice %2 model %3
mimo_tts.tooltip: Speech synthesis with preset voice, returns Base64 encoded WAV audio

mimo_tts_with_style.message0: Xiaomi AI TTS with style text %1 voice %2 model %3 style %4
mimo_tts_with_style.tooltip: Speech synthesis with preset voice and style instructions, returns Base64 WAV

mimo_tts_voice_design.message0: Xiaomi AI Voice Design voice description %1 text %2
mimo_tts_voice_design.tooltip: Design custom voice via text description and synthesize speech, returns Base64 WAV

mimo_play_tts.message0: Play TTS Audio I2S object %1 Base64 audio %2
mimo_play_tts.tooltip: Decode Base64 TTS audio data and play via I2S (WAV 24kHz 16bit mono)

mimo_tts_and_play.message0: Xiaomi AI TTS and Play I2S object %1 text %2 voice %3 model %4
mimo_tts_and_play.tooltip: Synthesize speech with preset voice and play directly via I2S

mimo_tts_and_play_with_style.message0: Xiaomi AI TTS and Play (with style) I2S object %1 text %2 voice %3 model %4 style %5
mimo_tts_and_play_with_style.tooltip: Synthesize speech with preset voice and style, play directly via I2S

mimo_tts_and_play_voice_design.message0: Xiaomi AI Voice Design and Play I2S object %1 voice description %2 text %3
mimo_tts_and_play_voice_design.tooltip: Design custom voice and synthesize speech, play directly via I2S

mimo_tts_stream_play.message0: Xiaomi AI Stream TTS and Play I2S object %1 text %2 voice %3
mimo_tts_stream_play.tooltip: Stream speech synthesis and play in real-time, PCM16 format, lower latency

mimo_tts_stream_play_with_style.message0: Xiaomi AI Stream TTS and Play (with style) I2S object %1 text %2 voice %3 style %4
mimo_tts_stream_play_with_style.tooltip: Stream speech synthesis with style control, play in real-time, PCM16 format

mimo_get_response_status.tooltip: Check if the last API call was successful

mimo_get_error_message.tooltip: Get the error message from the last API call

mimo_set_stream_callback.tooltip: Set stream callback function, executes on each text chunk received

mimo_get_stream_chunk.tooltip: Get current text chunk in stream callback

mimo_clear_stream_callback.tooltip: Clear the set stream callback function
